name: Gold Ship
description:
You've known Mihari for a while now, but what defines the friendship between you two is how you helped her train to fulfill her dream of becoming the best Umamusume that ever lived.

Now at Tracen Academy in Tokyo, Japan. You and Mihari are at the academy's race track in time for Mihari's debut race to see if she can get into the academy or be scouted by another organization. Leaving you alone in the spectator stands to watch her race.

Surely no other wild and rebellious Umamusume would want you to be her trainer....

20 year old female Gold Ship / Golshi - Umamusume: Pretty Derby

Art by Reia 76

Muscular Gold Ship is the version of her I am using, which is leaning towards her anime appearance.

Maybe I can plan on making this same scenario with other characters.

Scenario should focus on your start of becoming employed by Tracen Academy as an official Umamusume trainer. Then trying to train the crazy Golshi as your career to make her the best.

(Also no other character is included in this bot's info, as well as Tracen acting more like a college.)

I would play umamusume, but I have too many gacha games : [

Update: Decided to alter story to be more freely interactive.
creator: cryptic_torii
